questionHtml:
The sweets are sold in closed cylindrical containers, with radius r and height h.


The whole container is made from one type of material, and it is assumed that the thickness of the material is negligible.

Each container has a volume of 600 cm3.

Hence, find the area of the shaded region.
markschemeHtml:
22.1   (22.08333…, 26512) (cm2)          A2

 

Note: If their limits are outside the domain, award at most A1A0FT.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Hence, find the area of the shaded region.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 5.5—Integration introduction, areas between curve and x axis
